summary: Tested AnulacionesReport page and Hierarchical Authorization System. All features working correctly - Report page displays summary cards, bar/pie charts, user audit table with period filters and Excel export. Manager authorization flow working - reasons with requires_manager_auth show 'Auth' badge, PIN keypad appears, waiter PIN 1234 rejected, admin PIN 0000 accepted.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/void-audit-logs/report?period=day - Returns summary, reason_ranking, user_audit, logs
Backend: GET /api/void-audit-logs/report?period=week - Filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/void-audit-logs/report?period=month - Filter works correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/verify-manager with PIN 0000 - Returns authorized:true, user_id, user_name
Backend: POST /api/auth/verify-manager with PIN 1234 (waiter) - Returns 403 (not manager)
Backend: POST /api/auth/verify-manager with invalid PIN - Returns 401 or 403
Backend: GET /api/cancellation-reasons - Returns requires_manager_auth field for each reason
Backend: Reasons 'Botella no abierta', 'Plato mal preparado', 'Cliente se fue', 'Botella/bebida abierta', 'Comida rechazada' have requires_manager_auth=true
Backend: Reasons 'Error de digitacion', 'Plato no preparado' have requires_manager_auth=false
Frontend: /reports/anulaciones page loads with all components
Frontend: Executive summary cards showing Total Anulado, Recuperado, Pérdida/Merma, Tasa Recuperación
Frontend: Ranking de Razones bar chart renders correctly
Frontend: Distribución por Razón pie chart renders correctly
Frontend: Auditoría por Usuario table with columns: Usuario, Anulaciones, Valor Total, Recuperado, Pérdida, % Pérdida
Frontend: Period filters (Hoy/Semana/Mes) working - data-testid='filter-day/week/month'
Frontend: Export Excel button visible (data-testid='export-excel-btn')
Frontend: Cancel dialog shows Auth badge (yellow lock icon) for reasons requiring manager auth
Frontend: Cancel dialog shows Retorna (green) or Merma (red) badges
Frontend: 'Esta razón requiere autorización de gerente' notice appears when auth-required reason selected
Frontend: Button changes to 'Autorizar' (with lock icon) when auth-required reason selected
Frontend: PIN keypad appears after clicking Autorizar
Frontend: Waiter PIN 1234 correctly REJECTED
Frontend: Admin PIN 0000 correctly ACCEPTED (auto-verify at 4 digits)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AnulacionesReport and Hierarchical Authorization features are fully working. The report page at /reports/anulaciones shows void statistics with charts and tables. Cancellation reasons with requires_manager_auth=true display an 'Auth' badge and require manager PIN verification before proceeding. Admin PIN 0000 passes verification, waiter PIN 1234 fails. The void_audit_logs store requested_by and authorized_by for audit trail.

components: Executive Summary Cards (Total Anulado, Recuperado, Pérdida, Tasa)

behavior: Reasons with requires_manager_auth show Auth badge
PIN keypad appears for manager authorization

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
